name: social
description: Interact with your social networks — LinkedIn and X — from inside Codex: search people and posts, read profiles, timelines, comments, reactions, companies, jobs, and bookmarks, manage connected accounts, and post where enabled. Runs on the social CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Manage LinkedIn and X from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Social lets Codex interact with your LinkedIn and X accounts through the social CLI — search people and posts, read profiles, timelines, comments, reactions, companies, jobs, and bookmarks, manage connected accounts, and post where enabled. One login, one bill; the agent runs the calls, you stay the decision-maker.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use the social CLI.
